name: @alchemy.run/nx-r2-cache-worker
description: Self-hosted Nx remote cache Worker backed by Cloudflare R2

scripts.dev: doppler run --project alchemy-v2 --config ${DOPPLER_CONFIG:-dev} -- alchemy dev alchemy.run.ts --stage ${STAGE:-dev}
scripts.deploy: ./scripts/with-prod-guard.sh doppler run --project alchemy-v2 --config prod -- alchemy deploy alchemy.run.ts --adopt --yes --stage prod
scripts.destroy: ./scripts/with-prod-guard.sh doppler run --project alchemy-v2 --config prod -- alchemy destroy alchemy.run.ts ${CI:+--yes} --stage prod
scripts.plan: doppler run --project alchemy-v2 --config prod -- alchemy plan alchemy.run.ts --stage prod
